scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=mcp-bridge && npm run build --workspace=@agent-tasks/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=@agent-tasks/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=mcp-bridge && npm run typecheck --workspace=@agent-tasks/cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
